name: Is it safe to ask AI like ChatGPT about my law firm's Google ranking drop?
description: No, AI queries create non-privileged evidence usable in court; avoid entirely.[1][3]

mainEntity.name: Is it safe to ask AI like ChatGPT about my law firm's Google ranking drop?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, AI queries create non-privileged evidence usable in court; avoid entirely.[1][3]
acceptedAnswer.description: No, asking AI about your firm's rankings risks creating discoverable evidence that could contradict later testimony or strategy.[1] Federal courts like in New York have ruled AI interactions are not confidential or protected.[1][6] Key factors: no privilege without lawyer direction, high hallucination rates (17-34% in legal AI tools), device data recoverable.[1][3] Stop all AI use immediately for case matters, screenshot issues instead, and hire a lawyer to analyze rankings manually.[1] Professional review prevents pitfalls.
